name: get_address_utxos
description: Fetch all UTxOs at a given Cardano address, optionally filtered by asset.

name: get_tx_details
description: Retrieve full transaction details including inputs, outputs, metadata, and fees.

name: get_asset_info
description: Look up a native asset by its concatenated policyId+assetName hex string.

name: get_block_info
description: Retrieve block details by hash or absolute slot number.

name: query_address_history
description: List all transactions involving an address, newest first.

name: get_network_info
description: Return current epoch, slot tip, and live stake snapshot from the network.

name: get_nft_metadata
description: Fetch CIP-25 or CIP-68 NFT metadata for a given asset.

name: list_wallet_assets
description: List all native assets held at an address with quantities.

name: build_mint_transaction
description: Build an unsigned transaction that mints native tokens using a Plutus or native script.

name: get_policy_assets
description: List all assets under a given minting policy ID.

name: get_protocol_params
description: Fetch the current epoch's protocol parameters including min fee coefficients and execution prices.

name: calculate_min_ada
description: Calculate the minimum ADA required for a UTxO holding given native assets.

name: build_payment_tx
description: Build an unsigned ADA payment transaction between two addresses.

name: build_smart_contract_tx
description: Build a Plutus smart contract transaction with datum and redeemer.

name: submit_transaction
description: Submit a signed CBOR transaction to the Cardano network.

name: explain_eutxo_model
description: Return the bundled eUTxO explainer resource for AI context injection.

name: get_aiken_stdlib_docs
description: Return bundled Aiken standard library quick reference.

name: validate_aiken_snippet
description: Run `aiken check` on a Plutus validator snippet and return compiler output.

name: get_script_info
description: Fetch script type, size, serialised CBOR, and reference UTxOs for a script hash.

name: decode_cbor_datum
description: Decode a raw CBOR datum hex string into human-readable JSON using the Cardano Serialization Library.

name: scaffold_validator
description: Generate an Aiken validator scaffold for common patterns: escrow, vesting, or NFT gating.

name: encode_plutus_data
description: Encode a JSON Plutus data structure back to CBOR hex for use in transactions.

name: watch_address
description: Register a Kupo watch pattern for an address or script hash.

name: query_kupo_matches
description: Query Kupo for all UTxO matches against a registered pattern.

name: get_rollup_status
description: Check Kupo health and synchronisation status.

name: query_custom_indexer
description: Pass-through REST query to a Yaci Store custom indexer endpoint.

name: list_governance_proposals
description: List on-chain governance proposals filtered by status or action type.

name: get_proposal_details
description: Get full details for a governance proposal by its CIP-129 bech32 ID.

name: get_proposal_votes
description: Retrieve all DRep, SPO, and CC votes cast on a proposal.

name: list_dreps
description: List all registered DReps with delegation counts and status.

name: get_drep_info
description: Fetch profile, anchor, and voting history for a DRep by bech32 ID.

name: get_drep_votes
description: List all votes cast by a specific DRep.

name: get_drep_delegators
description: List all stake addresses delegated to a DRep.

name: list_committee_members
description: List all Constitutional Committee members with term expiry and status.

name: get_committee_member_votes
description: Fetch all votes cast by a specific Constitutional Committee member.

name: get_voter_proposal_votes
description: Get all votes a specific voter (DRep, SPO, or CC) cast on all proposals.

name: get_treasury_balance
description: Return current Cardano treasury balance and reserves in lovelace.

name: get_constitution
description: Fetch the current on-chain constitution anchor URL and hash.
